sections.content: Now I can see the white diamond is at the purple ring at the top! The image shows the white diamond inside the purple ring. This is progress. Now let me check the current state to see what the chain looks like.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'O', 'G', 'p'] and n['pixels'] > 5 and n['pixels'] < 100:
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, center=({center_r},{center_c}), children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
